W[4:8].justification: MEAN_MOTION td: Kepler consequence of energy loss

W[12:16].justification: BSTAR td: drag coefficient, leading but noisy

W[16:20].justification: ECCENTRICITY td: orbit shape, moderate signal

W[24:27].justification: d(PERIAPSIS)/dt: rate of altitude loss — critical

W[27:30].justification: d(MEAN_MOTION)/dt: acceleration of orbital period change

W[30:33].justification: d(MEAN_MOTION_DOT)/dt: jerk of decay — earliest signal

W[42:43].justification: PERIAPSIS late/early: altitude decline within window

W[43:44].justification: MEAN_MOTION late/early: period change within window

W[44:45].justification: MEAN_MOTION_DOT late/early: MOST DISCRIMINATING — explosive growth signature within single window

W[45:46].justification: BSTAR late/early: drag evolution within window

W[46:47].justification: ECCENTRICITY late/early: shape change within window

W[47:48].justification: APOAPSIS late/early: apoapsis change within window
